tasks.notes: Delivered 2026-07-11. M2.1 scope landed per the revised plan: two layouts (AppLayout, AppEmptyLayout), two placeholder shell components (AppSidebarSlot, AppTopBarSlot), one presentational helper (AppShellRegion), four bUnit test files, and the M1.1 chrome migration. The M1.2 components are preserved. Branch: feature/m2-1-application-shell. Commit: feat(m2.1): add application shell foundation. Push skipped (no remote configured).

M2.2 scope landed per the approved plan: INavigationRegistry, RouteMetadata, RouteMetadataAttribute, RouteRegistry in src/AiEng.Platform.Application/Navigation/; ServiceCollectionExtensions + NavigationServiceCollectionExtensions in src/AiEng.Platform.App/Composition/; AppSidebar, AppSidebarItem, AppNavItem in src/AiEng.Platform.App/Components/Navigation/; [RouteMetadata] applied to all 6 pages; AppSidebarSlot and AppSidebarSlotTests deleted; AppLayout updated to use AppSidebar; Pages_AreReachable_Through_Registry architecture test active and green. 28 new bUnit/integration tests + 1 new architecture test added. The session does NOT implement M2.3 (only the M2.3 plan is promoted to Awaiting Approval).

tasks.title: M2.3 — Top Bar, Breadcrumbs, and Page Headers
tasks.notes: Delivered 2026-07-11. M2.3 scope landed per the approved plan: AppTopBar (replaces AppTopBarSlot), AppThemeToggle (relocated from M1.1 chrome), AppUserAvatarSlot, AppBreadcrumb in src/AiEng.Platform.App/Components/. AppBreadcrumb wired into AppPageHeader.Breadcrumbs on DesignSystem.razor. AppTopBarSlot and AppTopBarSlotTests deleted; AppLayout updated to use AppTopBar. 27 new bUnit tests across 4 test files; 6 obsolete AppTopBarSlotTests removed. Branch: feature/m2-3-topbar-breadcrumbs. Commit: feat(m2.3): add top bar, breadcrumb, and page header integration. Push skipped (no remote configured). The session does NOT implement M2.4 (only the M2.4 plan is promoted to Awaiting Approval). Two documented deviations: (1) AppTopBar uses div.app-topbar + Leading/Trailing slots rather than AppStack + AppPageHeader; the surface still composes AppTopBar + AppPageHeader + AppBreadcrumb, matching the plan's intent. (2) Optional architecture test Breadcrumb_Follows_Registry_Parent_Chain was skipped per plan § 8 step 11 which marked it optional.

tasks.title: Theme toggle is not interactive in the running app (M2.4 follow-up bug)
tasks.links_to_capability: AppShellRegion / AppThemeToggle (shell/theme capability; the M2.1 AppShellRegion and the M2.3 AppThemeToggle form the shell/theme surface; the bug is in the interactive render seam, not in the JS contract)
tasks.notes: Reproduction: (1) dotnet run on http://localhost:5170. (2) Open the home page. (3) The theme toggle control is visible in the top bar's Trailing slot (button.app-theme-toggle-light, aria-pressed=false). (4) Click the toggle. Expected: the data-theme attribute on documentElement changes from 'light' to 'dark' immediately, the CSS variables swap to the dark tokens, the localStorage 'app-theme' key is set to 'dark', the toggle's class changes to 'app-theme-toggle-dark', and the change persists across navigation and browser refresh. Actual: the click does not change the document theme; the toggle visually stays as 'app-theme-toggle-light' with aria-pressed=false. The bUnit tests (AppThemeToggleTests.cs) all pass; the JSInterop contract is correct; the bug is the missing @rendermode InteractiveServer on the AppLayout / AppTopBar / AppThemeToggle chain. The bUnit tests render the component in isolation under InteractiveServer (inherited from the test render context), so they pass; the running app renders the layout under the default static SSR mode, so the @onclick handler is not wired up. Tests: passing (10 in AppThemeToggleTests.cs + 3 in AppLayoutTests.cs + 2 in AppTopBarTests.cs). Toggle control: present. Actual theme: does not change reliably in the running app. Expected behaviour: (1) theme changes immediately on click; (2) persists across navigation (Blazor Server is a single-page app, so this means the IIFE on reconnect / page mount reads localStorage and applies the theme); (3) persists across browser refresh (the IIFE in App.razor reads localStorage on every page load). The fix is to add @rendermode InteractiveServer to AppLayout.razor (or to AppTopBar.razor + AppThemeToggle.razor if the layout must remain static), so the @onclick handler is wired to the interactive circuit. Do NOT fix in this task; this is a non-blocking bug recorded for a future session. The user explicitly asked to record the bug and continue with the first dependency-satisfied Ready task (M2.5 plan approval).
